allow: PowerShell(Get-Service -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -match "mysql|maria|herd" -or $_.Name -match "mysql|maria|herd"} | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Herd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime | Select-Object -First 10)
